D:\APPS\MINGGW\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\shader.dir/objects.a
D:\APPS\MINGGW\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\shader.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\shader.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\APPS\MINGGW\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\shader.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o shader.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libshader.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\shader.dir\linkLibs.rsp
